name: Easy Chicken Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Completely coat the inside of your casserole dish with mayonnaise.
2. Cover the chicken with cheese.
3. Mix the soup and wine together in a separate bowl.
4. Pour the soup mixture over the chicken and cheese.
5. Sprinkle breadcrumbs evenly over the top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30-45 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
